summary: First distributable browser-extension release for Chrome and Chromium-based Microsoft Edge.
scope: Keep Advanced Settings visible below the camera control at all times.
Close the controller only after the pointer leaves the controller window.
Add a repeatable ZIP packaging command for Chrome Web Store and Microsoft Edge Add-ons.
validation: Static controller layout inspection at 300x350 and 300x640
notes: The ZIP is for store submission; use dist-extension for local developer-mode installation.
Microsoft Edge officially supports the MV3 offscreen, scripting, storage, and sidePanel APIs used by this project.
